subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! May thou forever abide beneath the shade of the divine Lote-Tree and partake of its fruits, which are the knowledge of the Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز خدا انشاء الله لازال در ظل سدره الهیه ساکن باشی و از اثمار آن که معرفت جمال
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment, @love of God, @station of the Manifestation of God
